overview: A professional multi-page corporate website for Arukien Technologies — an IT services company. Features five pages (Home, About, Services, Portfolio, Contact) with deep blue and cyan design system, glassmorphism UI, scroll animations, and TanStack Router navigation.
features: Multi-page routing with Home, About, Services, Portfolio, and Contact pages
Hero section with headline, subtext, and dual CTA buttons
Services overview with detailed cards for 5 service areas
Why Choose Us section with 4 key differentiators
Testimonials carousel with dummy client reviews
Team section with placeholder member cards
Portfolio grid with project images, descriptions, and tech tags
Contact form with validation and company info sidebar
Glassmorphism UI with deep blue (#0A2540) and cyan/teal accents
Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop
Sticky navbar with mobile hamburger menu
